message:
fix(vdbe): propagate COLLATE NOCASE to IN/BETWEEN codegen + add 24 conformance test suites

IN and BETWEEN opcodes now resolve column-level collation (e.g. NOCASE)
via effective_collation_ctx and pass it as P4::Collation to Eq/Lt/Gt
comparison opcodes. Previously, columns declared COLLATE NOCASE were
compared case-sensitively in IN lists and BETWEEN ranges.

New conformance oracle tests cover: div/mod edges, CASE patterns, scalar
subqueries, string ops, COLLATE NOCASE, upsert, multi-CTE, GROUP HAVING,
compound SELECT with ORDER/LIMIT, UPDATE complex SET, DELETE complex
WHERE, expression eval edges, JOIN combinations, INSERT defaults, null
functions, aggregate null/empty groups, REPLACE, multi-UNIQUE constraints,
derived table joins, datetime modifiers, CAST, trigger cascade, column
type affinity, WHERE mixed operators.

Core: 2002 pass, 0 fail, 3 ignored. Clippy + fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
